name: Chemomab Therapeutics Ltd.
business: Chemomab Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing CM-101, a monoclonal antibody targeting CCL24 for fibrotic and inflammatory diseases. Its lead indication is primary sclerosing cholangitis (PSC) and systemic sclerosis (SSc). The company has no approved products and has not generated any revenue.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on the discovery and development of innovative therapeutics for fibrotic and inflammatory diseases with high unmet needs.

catalysts.sentence: We are also planning to open a Phase 2 clinical trial in SSc around midyear of 2023.
We believe that our existing cash, cash equivalents and bank deposits will enable us to fund our operating expenses and capital expenditure requirements at least through March 31, 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Over $1 billion market opportunity for PSC and over $1.5 billion for SSc
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that there are approximately 77 thousand patients suffering from PSC in the U.S., EU and Japan, representing over a $1 billion market opportunity, and approximately 170 thousand patients suffering from SSc in those same markets, representing over a $1.5 billion market opportunity.
